content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "1 week of Premium free" explicitly in exchange for leaving a 5-star review, a direct quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits forcing or rewarding users for reviews/ratings (3.2.2(x), 5.6.3), and this copy ties a paid-feature unlock (free Premium week) directly to leaving a 5-star review, which is exactly the manipulation Apple screens for. This is very likely to trigger rejection during review. Fix: remove the review-for-reward line entirely and, if you want to prompt reviews, use `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview()` without any incentive attached.
